hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\"" 2>/dev/null); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "git (commit|merge|push)" || exit 0; branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ "$branch" = "main" ] && echo "WARNING: You are about to run \"$cmd\" on the main branch. This is usually wrong — consider working on a feature branch instead. Proceeding anyway? If not, stop and create a branch first." >&2; exit 0'
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.claude/skills/' && python scripts/sync_skills_config.py; } 2>/dev/null || true
